title: Mirror Report — MARKETING — epos_ecosystem
body:
**Mirror Report: TTLG Marketing Diagnostic**

WHAT WE FOUND: Our analysis reveals that your small business has a limited online presence, with a restricted content output and a sparse platform presence. Specifically, you're averaging only 2-3 social media posts per week and updating your blog just once a month. This limited content output is a significant gap that's hindering your marketing efforts. Furthermore, your presence on major social media platforms is lacking, which is a low-severity issue that still requires attention.

THE REAL COST: This limited online presence is likely costing you potential customers, revenue, and brand awareness. By not having a robust content strategy, you're missing out on opportunities to engage with your target audience, build trust, and establish your brand as an authority in your industry. This, in turn, can lead to a loss of market share and a decrease in sales.

THE PATH FORWARD: To address these gaps, we recommend focusing on the highest-leverage indicator: increasing your content output. This can be achieved by developing a content calendar, creating engaging and relevant content, and posting more frequently on social media. Additionally, we suggest expanding your platform presence by claiming and optimizing your profiles on major social media platforms. By doing so, you'll be able to reach a wider audience, build your brand, and drive more traffic to your website.

WHAT CHANGES IN 30 DAYS: With a focused effort on increasing your content output and expanding your platform presence, you can expect to see measurable improvements in your online presence within 30 days. Specifically, you can aim to increase your social media posts to 5-7 per week and update your blog bi-weekly, which will help to drive more engagement and attract new followers.

SOVEREIGN ALIGNMENT SCORE: With a current score of 10/25, there's significant room for improvement in your marketing efforts. By addressing the identified gaps and implementing the recommended changes, you'll be well on your way to enhancing your online presence, increasing your brand visibility, and driving more sales.
